parameters.command:
sh -c 'REPO="/home/cbk/qwen-agent-collective"
cd "$REPO" || { echo "=COMMITS="; echo; echo "=REPORT="; echo "Repo not found."; exit 0; }
printf "=COMMITS=\n"
git log --pretty=format:"%h|%ar|%s|%an" -20
printf "\n=REPORT=\n"
LATEST=$(find reports/qwen-worker reports/local-worker -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -1)
[ -n "$LATEST" ] && cat "$LATEST" || echo "No reports yet."'
